report.summary: UX audit of 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE pages and 6 recently published pages; added BackToTop navigation to both queued pages, fixed accessibility font sizes on Hyperliquid, and corrected FAQ structured data syntax.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to /ecosystem/hyperliquid (HyperliquidClient.tsx) for long-scroll navigation
Added BackToTop component to /learn/crypto-oracles-guide-2026 for long-scroll navigation
Fixed stat card label font sizes from 11px to 12px on Hyperliquid page (accessibility compliance)
Fixed badge/tag font sizes from 11px to 12px on Hyperliquid page header badges
Corrected FAQ structured data bracket notation from computed property keys to standard property keys on Hyperliquid page

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (No Action Needed)
items: Crypto Oracles Guide: excellent Tailwind + CSS variables usage, proper Breadcrumb and StructuredData components
Telegram Trading Bots Guide: well-structured with proper metadata, OG images, stat cards, semantic HTML
Hyperliquid Trading Guide and FOMC Fed Rate Guide: standard layout patterns followed
Ecosystem pages (Virtuals Protocol, Curve, Compound): dynamic routing + API OG images working correctly

sections.title: OG Image Status
items: All PUBLISH_QUEUE pages have properly configured OG images via /api/og endpoint
Hyperliquid: /api/og?type=page (1200x630) — no ecosystem type available, page type used correctly
Oracles Guide: /api/og?type=learn (1200x630) — correct type for learn content
No new static OG images required — dynamic generation covers all current pages
